frictions.description: Initial local stack was missing required env wiring (`LOCALHOST_PUBLIC_DOMAIN` for web, `BETTER_AUTH_URL` injection for PartyKit), causing early 500/401 failures during live capture setup.
frictions.resolution: Reran against an isolated local stack (`web:3100`, `broadcast:2999`) with correct env injection and captured successful websocket broadcast evidence for terminal daemon-event test-auth flow.

appliedUpdates.description: Added non-production test-context daemon auth seam gated by internal shared secret and explicit test headers; production auth remains unchanged.
Added test coverage for test-auth acceptance/rejection and terminal flow broadcast with refetch:["delivery-loop"].
Upgraded VAL-CROSS-001 report with live end-to-end evidence: daemon-event ack + websocket delivery-loop refetch capture.

flowReports.summary: Daemon terminal events trigger broadcast with delivery-loop refetch wiring in daemon-event route.
No-spam behavior remains protected by material-change checks and route dedup/idempotency tests.

Authentication blocker is removed in test context and proven live: terminal v2 daemon-event under test-auth acknowledged and emitted websocket `refetch:["delivery-loop"]` patch for the target thread/chat.
evidence: pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/app/api/daemon-event/route.test.ts
